name: Swing Envy
about: Swing Envy is an indoor golf facility in Orlando, Florida, specializing in lessons, practice, and simulator rentals. The venue utilizes high-end technology such as Foresight launch monitors and Swing Catalyst video analysis software to provide precise data and feedback for golfers of all levels. They feature a 1,200+ sq ft indoor chipping and putting green, Orlando's only public indoor short game area, and a PuttView interactive putting system. Swing Envy caters to individuals seeking to improve their game through professional instruction, data-driven practice sessions, and simulator play on various virtual golf courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Foresight launch monitors with true-to-life ball flight simulation
Orlando's only indoor public short game area with a 1,200+ sq ft chipping green
PuttView interactive putting system for enhanced putting practice and games
Professional lessons using Swing Catalyst and Sportsbox AI for 3D swing analysis

food_and_drink.notes: No information about on-site food service
No information about on-site alcohol service

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading performance simulator with game modes for accuracy and control

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the facility also offers club rentals and professional club fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No information is provided on the website about outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required to play a full 18 holes on the simulators.

faq.question: Is Swing Envy kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior golf lessons and is open to youth golfers.
